'''Yander''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] miner who is the father of [[Tarl (Ord Cestus)|Tarl]], [[Tonoté]], and [[Mithail]] and lived on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] during the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Some time after his first wife tragically died, he married a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Sheeka Tull]]. Sadly, Yander passed away during the war.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}}
